raw_source.title: [Global] CoinCatch is looking for Talent Acquisition Specialist
raw_source.body:
## Talent Acquisition Specialist / Senior HR – Global Crypto Exchange 

## 
1. Proven experience hiring for crypto-native roles: Affiliate Manager, BD, KOL/influencer growth, marketing, ops
2. Strong talent access in the U.S. and European (required)
3. Hands-on ability to drive full-cycle recruiting — sourcing, screening, interviewing, closing
4. Native or near-native English fluency
5. Operates independently and effectively — no résumé-forwarders, no bureaucracy
We value execution and believe in sharing growth and success with our team.

## We’re not looking for someone with just HR titles at big companies — we need someone who’s actually built hiring pipelines and delivered results in fast-moving teams.

## Job Nature

- Full-time 
- Remote 

## Salary and Benefits
2000-5000 USDT / Month

## Remote

## TG：Stella0246
      Email：careers@coincatch.com
